title: Election Selection
subtitle: Choose an election to participate in
description: Select the election you want to vote in. You can participate in demo elections for testing or official elections for voting.

selector.label: Select an Election
selector.no_elections: No elections available at this time

demo_badge.description: This is a demo election. All users can participate to test the voting system.

official_badge.description: This is an official election. Only eligible voters can participate.

eligibility.demo: All users can vote in demo elections (for testing)
eligibility.real: Only users with voting eligibility in the eligible time window can vote

messages.selection_required: Please select an election to continue
messages.not_eligible: You are not eligible to vote in this election
messages.election_inactive: This election is not currently active
messages.voting_not_started: Voting for this election has not started yet
messages.voting_ended: Voting for this election has ended
messages.already_voted: You have already voted in this election

demo_mode_notice.title: You are in DEMO mode
demo_mode_notice.message: This is a demo election for testing the voting system. Your votes will not count towards official results.
demo_mode_notice.warning: Demo data can be reset at any time for testing purposes.
demo_mode_notice.aria_label: Demo mode warning: this is a demonstration election

cleanup.title: Clean Up Demo Data
cleanup.message: This will delete all demo voting data older than 30 days
cleanup.error: Failed to clean up demo data

reset.title: Reset Demo Election
reset.message: This will delete ALL demo voting data for this election. This action cannot be undone.

help.demo_vs_official: What is the difference between demo and official elections?
help.demo_explanation: Demo elections are for testing the voting system. All users can vote, and the data is separate from official elections.
help.official_explanation: Official elections are used for real voting. Only eligible users can vote during the voting period.
help.how_to_select: How do I select an election?
help.selection_explanation: Click 'Select Election' to choose which election you want to vote in. You can only vote in one election at a time.
help.change_election: Can I change my election selection?
help.change_explanation: Yes, you can change your selection at any time by clicking 'Change Election' before you submit your vote.

error.title: Error Loading Elections
error.failed_to_load: Failed to load available elections. Please try again.
error.selection_failed: Failed to save your election selection. Please try again.

select_election.title: Select an Election
select_election.heading: Multiple Elections Active
select_election.subtitle: Choose which election you want to participate in
select_election.instructions: Select one of the active elections below to begin your voting journey
select_election.no_elections: No active elections at this time

voting_page.title: Active Election - Voting Page
voting_page.step2: Read and agree to the election terms
voting_page.secure_desc: Your vote is encrypted and anonymous. No voter tracking.
voting_page.verified_desc: All elections are audited and results are verifiable.
voting_page.global_desc: Vote from anywhere in the world, anytime during voting period.
voting_page.help_desc: If you have any questions about the voting process, please contact the election committee.
voting_page.note1: You can only vote once in this election
voting_page.already_voted: You have already voted in this election
voting_page.not_eligible: You are not eligible to vote at this time
voting_page.rule_no_share: Do not share your verification code
voting_page.rule_one_vote: Voting can only be done once
voting_page.rule_no_change: Votes cannot be changed after submission
